{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320161256A12A80CF5E366CCE0AC2\"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353384543057527615","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的写作风格简洁明了，文笔流畅，通俗易懂。作者通过对历史案例的解读和制度剖析，让我轻松了解中国古代历史的精华。而且书中的观点独到，能引发读者的思考，真的很棒！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709126688,"group_id":"7287839444890029071","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny5/fEudil87iZfwi5BqcPD++kCbP6ywMDyc1FTOqD9A","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3459536411957129","user_name":"喜欢茶辣的木子齐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3459536411957129","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7287839444890029071","book_info":{"abstract":"中国历史内涵丰富、博大精深，蕴藏着甚深的智慧，但历史现象纷繁复杂，普通读者很难把握全貌。本书选取了若干经典的历史案例，既有横向的事件解读，又有纵向的制度剖析，横纵结合，像一张疏密有致的网络，将中国古代历史的精华渐次呈现。借助作者宏阔的视野和敏锐的观察，我们便能洞悉历史真相，以史为鉴，烛照当下。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3c1314f15d3fff1996fb620d2c1caa95~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"张程","author_id":"","book_id":"7287839444890029071","book_name":"中国历史的经验与教训","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1871人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":241,\
